### [Constants](/documentation/iosurface/iosurface-constants#Constants)

[`let kIOSurfaceAllocSize: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceallocsize)CFNumber of the total allocation size of the buffer including all planes.[`let kIOSurfaceBytesPerElement: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacebytesperelement)The total number of bytes in an element.[`let kIOSurfaceBytesPerRow: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacebytesperrow)The bytes per row of the buffer.[`let kIOSurfaceCacheMode: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacecachemode)The CPU cache mode to be used for the allocation.[`let kIOSurfaceColorSpace: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacecolorspace)[`let kIOSurfaceElementHeight: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceelementheight)CFNumber for how many pixels high each element is.[`let kIOSurfaceElementWidth: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceelementwidth)CFNumber for how many pixels wide each element is.[`let kIOSurfaceHeight: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceheight)The height of the IOSurface buffer in pixels.[`let kIOSurfaceICCProfile: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceiccprofile)[`let kIOSurfaceIsGlobal: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceisglobal)CFBoolean If true, the IOSurface may be looked up by any task in the system by its ID.Deprecated[`let kIOSurfaceName: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacename)[`let kIOSurfaceOffset: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceoffset)The starting offset into the buffer.[`let kIOSurfacePixelFormat: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacepixelformat)A 32-bit unsigned integer that stores the traditional macOS buffer format.[`let kIOSurfacePixelSizeCastingAllowed: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfacepixelsizecastingallowed)[`let kIOSurfacePlaneBase: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanebase)The base offset into the buffer for this plane.[`let kIOSurfacePlaneBitsPerElement: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanebitsperelement)[`let kIOSurfacePlaneBytesPerElement: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanebytesperelement)The bytes per element of this plane.[`let kIOSurfacePlaneBytesPerRow: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanebytesperrow)The bytes per row of this plane.[`let kIOSurfacePlaneComponentBitDepths: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanecomponentbitdepths)[`let kIOSurfacePlaneComponentBitOffsets: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanecomponentbitoffsets)[`let kIOSurfacePlaneComponentNames: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplanecomponentnames)[`let kIOSurfacePlaneComponentRanges: kIOSurfacePlaneElementHeight: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplaneelementheight)The element height of this plane.[`let kIOSurfacePlaneElementWidth: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplaneelementwidth)The element width of this plane.[`let kIOSurfacePlaneHeight: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplaneheight)The height of this plane in pixels.[`let kIOSurfacePlaneInfo: CFString`](/documentation/iosurface/kiosurfaceplaneinfo)CFArray describing each image plane in the buffer as a CFDictionary.[`let kIOSurfacePlaneOffset:
